nasb.text: For if a man finds his enemy, will he let him go away safely? May the Lord therefore reward you with good in return for what you have done to me this day.

esv.text: For if a man finds his enemy, will he let him go away safe? So may the Lord reward you with good for what you have done to me this day.

cnv.text: 如果人遇見仇敵，怎會讓他平平安安離去呢？願耶和華因你今天對我所作的以福報答你。

ccb.text: 有谁会让自己手中的仇敌平安离去呢？愿耶和华因你今日善待我而赐福你。
